name: Zabs
description: Returns the absolute value of the given number.

name: ZaddButton
description: Adds a button component to the bot's response.

name: ZaddCmdReactions
description: Immediately adds one or more emoji reactions to the message that triggered the command.

name: ZaddEmoji
description: Downloads an image from the given URL and creates a new custom emoji in the current server, optionally returning the usable emoji string.

name: ZaddField
description: Adds a named field with a value to the specified embed slot, with an optional inline layout flag.

name: ZaddMentionableSelect
description: Adds a mentionable select menu (users and roles) component to the bot's response.

name: ZaddMessageReactions
description: Adds one or more emoji reactions to a specific message in the specified channel.

name: ZaddReactions
description: Queues one or more emoji reactions to be added to the bot's own response message after it is sent.

name: ZaddRoleSelect
description: Adds a role select menu component to the bot's response.

name: ZaddSelectMenuOption
description: Adds an option to the current string select menu.

name: ZaddTextInput
description: Adds a text input field to the current modal.

name: ZaddUserSelect
description: Adds a user select menu component to the bot's response.

name: ZafkChannelID
description: Returns the ID of the AFK voice channel in the current guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

name: ZafkTimeout
description: Returns the AFK timeout in seconds configured for the guild.

name: ZallMembersCount
description: Returns the total combined member count across all guilds the bot is currently in.

name: ZallowRoleMentions
description: Restricts role pings in the bot response to only the listed role IDs; if no IDs are given, all role mentions are suppressed.

name: ZallowUserMentions
description: Restricts user pings in the bot response to only the listed user IDs; if no IDs are given, all user mentions are suppressed.

name: ZargCount
description: Returns the number of space-separated words in the text.

name: ZargsCheck
description: Halts execution with an error if the number of whitespace-separated arguments in the message is outside the allowed range.

name: Zasync
description: Spawns a named background task that runs the provided code block concurrently.

name: ZauditCount
description: Fetches the guild audit log and returns the number of returned entries.

name: ZauditEntries
description: Fetches the latest guild audit log entries and returns them as a JSON array.

name: ZauditEntryAction
description: Returns the action name for the selected audit log entry.

name: ZauditEntryChanges
description: Returns the change details for the selected audit log entry as JSON.

name: ZauditEntryID
description: Returns the audit log entry ID for the selected entry.

name: ZauditEntryReason
description: Returns the reason attached to the selected audit log entry.

name: ZauditEntryTarget
description: Returns the target ID for the selected audit log entry.

name: ZauditEntryUser
description: Returns the user ID of the actor who created the selected audit log entry.

name: ZauditLatest
description: Fetches the most recent guild audit log entry and returns it as a JSON object.

name: Zauthor
description: Sets the author name on the specified embed slot.

name: ZauthorIcon
description: Sets the author icon image URL on the specified embed slot, requiring an author to already be set.

name: ZauthorURL
description: Sets a hyperlink URL on the embed's author name, requiring an author to already be set.

name: Zawait
description: Blocks execution until the specified background task completes and returns its output.

name: Zban
description: Bans a user from the guild with an optional reason and optional number of days of messages to delete.

name: ZblackListIDs
description: Halts command execution if the triggering user's ID matches any of the provided user IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You are blacklisted from using this command.

name: ZblackListRoles
description: Halts command execution if the triggering user holds any role matching the provided role names.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You are blacklisted from using this command.

example: ZblackListRoles{Muted;Banned;You are not allowed to use this command.}

name: ZblackListRolesIDs
description: Halts command execution if the triggering user holds any role matching the provided role IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You are blacklisted from using this command.

name: ZblackListServers
description: Halts command execution if the current server's guild ID matches any of the provided guild IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: This command is not available in this server.

name: ZblackListUsers
description: Halts command execution if the triggering user's username matches any of the provided usernames.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You are blacklisted from using this command.

name: ZboostCount
description: Returns the number of active Nitro boosts the guild has received.

name: ZboostLevel
description: Returns the current Nitro boost tier of the current guild as a number from 0 to 3.

name: ZbotCommands
description: Returns an alphabetically sorted list of all loaded command triggers, joined by the specified separator.

name: ZbotID
description: Returns the bot's own user ID.

name: ZbotOwnerID
description: Returns the user ID of the bot application's owner.

name: ZbotTyping
description: Broadcasts a typing indicator in the current channel.

name: ZbyteCount
description: Returns the number of UTF-8 bytes in the text.

name: Zcalculate
description: Evaluates a mathematical expression supporting +, -, *, /, %, and ** operators with parentheses and correct operator precedence.

name: ZcategoryChannels
description: Returns the channels inside a category sorted by position, formatted as names, IDs, mentions, or a count, joined by the specified separator.

name: ZcategoryCount
description: Returns the number of category channels in the guild.

name: ZcategoryID
description: Returns the snowflake ID of a category channel in the current guild matched by name.

name: Zceil
description: Returns the smallest integer greater than or equal to the given number.

name: ZchangeCooldownTime
description: Overrides the label words used when formatting remaining cooldown times.

name: ZchangeNickname
description: Changes the guild nickname of the command author or specified user; supports the %username% placeholder in the nickname string.

name: ZchannelCount
description: Returns the total number of channels in the current guild.

name: ZchannelCreated
description: Returns the Unix timestamp in seconds at which the channel was created, extracted from its snowflake ID.

name: ZchannelExists
description: Returns true if a channel with the given ID exists, or false otherwise.

name: ZchannelID
description: Returns the current channel's ID, or searches for and returns the ID of a guild channel matching the given name.

name: ZchannelInvites
description: Returns a space-separated list of invite codes for the given channel.

name: ZchannelName
description: Returns the name of a Discord channel by its ID, falling back to the current channel if no ID is provided.

name: ZchannelNames
description: Returns a sorted list of all channel names in the guild joined by the specified separator.

name: ZchannelPosition
description: Returns the position index of a channel within the guild's channel list.

name: ZchannelTopic
description: Returns the topic of a Discord text channel, or an empty string if none is set.

name: ZchannelType
description: Returns the type of a channel as a string such as text, voice, category, announcement, stage, forum, thread, or dm.

name: ZchannelWebhooks
description: Returns a space-separated list of webhook URLs configured for the given channel.

name: ZcharCount
description: Returns the number of Unicode characters in the text.

name: ZcheckCondition
description: Evaluates a condition expression and returns true or false.

name: ZcheckContains
description: Returns true if the text contains any of the provided words, using a case-insensitive comparison.

name: ZcheckUserPerms
description: Returns true if the specified user has all of the given guild permissions.

name: Zclear
description: Bulk-deletes up to 100 recent messages in the current channel, with an optional user filter and configurable handling of pinned messages.

name: ZclearReactions
description: Removes a specific emoji reaction from a message, or clears all reactions when !all is passed as the emoji.

name: Zcolor
description: Sets the accent color of the specified embed slot using a hex color code.

name: ZcolorRole
description: Sets the color of an existing role to the specified hex color code.

name: ZcommandName
description: Returns the name of the currently executing command, falling back to the trigger string if no command name is set.

name: ZcommandsCount
description: Returns the total number of commands loaded from the commands directory.

name: ZcommandTrigger
description: Returns the trigger string of the currently executing command.

name: Zcooldown
description: Applies a per-user per-server cooldown that blocks re-use of the current command until the duration expires.

name: ZcreateChannel
description: Creates a new channel in the current guild with the specified name, type, and optional parent category.

name: ZcreateEvent
description: Creates a new scheduled voice event in the server and returns its event ID.
example: ZcreateEvent{Summer Meetup;987654321012345678;1720000000;Join us for a fun event!}

name: ZcreateForumTag
description: Adds a new available tag to a forum channel with an optional emoji and moderation flag.

name: ZcreateInvite
description: Creates an invite for the specified channel and returns its code.

name: ZcreatePost
description: Creates a new forum post in a forum channel and returns its thread ID.

name: ZcreateRole
description: Creates a new role in the guild with the specified name and optional color, hoist, and mentionable settings.

name: ZcreationDate
description: Returns the creation date derived from any Discord snowflake ID, formatted according to the optional format string.

name: ZcropText
description: Crops text to a maximum number of characters and appends an ending string if the text was truncated.

name: ZcustomEmoji
description: Returns the usable Discord emoji string for a server custom emoji looked up by name.

name: ZcustomID
description: Returns the custom ID of the current interaction.

name: Zdate
description: Returns the current date in YYYY-MM-DD format using the active timezone.

name: Zday
description: Returns the current day of the month using the active timezone.

name: Zdeafen
description: Server-deafens the specified user so they cannot hear any audio in voice channels.

name: Zdefer
description: Defers the interaction response, showing a thinking indicator and extending the response window to 15 minutes.

name: Zdelay
description: Executes a block of code after a specified duration (e.g., 10s, 1m).

name: ZdeleteChannels
description: Deletes one or more channels by their IDs.

name: ZdeleteChannelsByName
description: Deletes all channels in the current guild whose names match any of the provided names.

name: ZdeleteEvent
description: Deletes a scheduled event from the current server by its event ID.

name: ZdeleteForumTag
description: Removes an available tag from a forum channel by its tag ID.

name: ZdeleteInvite
description: Deletes a Discord invite by its code.

name: ZdeleteMessage
description: Deletes the specified message from a channel.

name: ZdeleteRole
description: Permanently deletes the specified role from the guild.

name: ZdeleteSticker
description: Deletes a guild sticker from the current server by its sticker ID.

name: Zdescription
description: Sets the description text on the specified embed slot.

name: ZdisplayName
description: Returns the display name of the command author or specified user; use server for the guild nickname or global for the Discord global name.

name: Zdiv
description: Divides the first value by each subsequent divisor in sequence and returns the result.

name: Zdm
description: Sends a direct message with the specified content to the given user.
example: Zdm{123456789012345678;Hello, this is a private message!}

name: ZdmChannelID
description: Returns the ID of the DM channel between the bot and a user, creating it if it does not yet exist.

name: ZeditButton
description: Edits a button on an existing message by its custom ID.

name: ZeditChannelPerms
description: Edits permission overwrites for a user or role on a channel, using + to allow, - to deny, and / to neutralize each named permission.

name: ZeditEvent
description: Edits one or more fields of an existing scheduled event by its ID.

name: ZeditForumTag
description: Edits the name or moderation flag of an existing forum tag by its ID.

name: ZeditMessage
description: Replaces the text content of an existing message in a channel.

name: ZeditSelectMenu
description: Edits the properties of a string select menu on an existing message.

name: ZeditSelectMenuOption
description: Replaces the options on an existing select menu with a single updated option.

name: ZeditSplitText
description: Replaces the element at the given 1-based index in the current split text with a new value.

name: ZeditThread
description: Edits one or more properties of an existing thread such as name, archived state, archive duration, lock status, and slowmode.

name: ZemojiExists
description: Returns true if a custom emoji with the given ID exists in the current server, or false otherwise.

name: ZemojiName
description: Returns the name of a custom emoji in the current server looked up by its ID.

name: ZemoteCount
description: Returns the total number of custom emojis in the current server.

name: Zenabled
description: Halts command execution with an optional error message when the condition is false, or continues silently when it is true.
example: Zenabled{true;This feature is not available right now.}

name: ZendsWith
description: Returns true if the text ends with the specified suffix.

name: Zephemeral
description: Marks the current slash command response as ephemeral so it is only visible to the invoking user.

name: Zerror
description: Halts execution and displays a custom user-facing error message.
example: Zerror{You do not have permission to use this command.}

name: Zeval
description: Parses and executes a ZBR code string at runtime, returning the concatenated text output.

name: ZeventChannel
description: Returns the channel ID associated with a scheduled event, or an empty string for external events.

name: ZeventCount
description: Returns the total number of scheduled events in the current server.

name: ZeventDescription
description: Returns the description of a scheduled event by its event ID, or an empty string if no description is set.

name: ZeventEnd
description: Returns the end time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp string, or an empty string if no end time is set.

name: ZeventName
description: Returns the name of a scheduled event by its event ID.

name: ZeventStart
description: Returns the start time of a scheduled event as a Unix timestamp string.

name: ZeventStatus
description: Returns the current status of a scheduled event as one of: scheduled, active, completed, or cancelled.

name: ZeventSubscribers
description: Returns the number of users subscribed to a scheduled event.

name: ZexecutionTime
description: Returns the number of milliseconds elapsed since the current command began executing.

name: Zfloor
description: Returns the largest integer less than or equal to the given number.

name: Zfooter
description: Sets the footer text on the specified embed slot.

name: ZfooterIcon
description: Sets the footer icon image URL on the specified embed slot, requiring a footer to already be set.

name: ZforJson
description: Iterates over a JSON array at the given key path within the current parsed JSON object, executing the code block for each element.

name: ZforSplit
description: Iterates over the elements produced by a prior ZtextSplit call, executing the code block for each element with ZloopIndex and ZloopValue populated.

name: ZforumPostCount
description: Returns the number of currently active posts in a forum channel.

name: ZforumPosts
description: Returns a space-separated list of active post IDs in a forum channel.

name: ZforumTagEmoji
description: Returns the emoji associated with a forum tag.

name: ZforumTagID
description: Returns the ID of a forum tag matching the given name, or an empty string if not found.

name: ZforumTagModerated
description: Returns true if the specified forum tag is restricted to moderators, or false otherwise.

name: ZforumTags
description: Returns a space-separated list of available tag names in a forum channel.

name: ZfromTimestamp
description: Formats a Unix timestamp into a human-readable date/time string using the active timezone and the specified format.

name: ZgetAttachments
description: Returns attachment URLs from the triggering message joined by newlines, or the single URL at the specified 1-based index.

name: ZgetBanReason
description: Returns the ban reason for the specified user, optionally checked against a different guild.

name: ZgetChannelVar
description: Returns the value of a channel-scoped variable, defaulting to the current channel if not specified.

name: ZgetCooldown
description: Returns the remaining cooldown time in seconds for the current user and command.

name: ZgetEmbedData
description: Fetches the specified field from an embed on an existing Discord message, where type is one of title, description, footer, color, image, or timestamp.

name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserCount
description: Returns the number of users and roles selected in a mentionable select menu interaction.

name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserID
description: Returns the selected user or role ID at the given 1-based index from a mentionable select menu interaction.

name: ZgetMentionableSelectUserIDs
description: Returns all selected user and role IDs from a mentionable select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

name: ZgetMessage
description: Fetches the specified field from a Discord message, where type is one of content, authorID, username, or avatar.

name: ZgetReactions
description: Returns a separator-joined list of usernames of users who reacted to a specific message with the given emoji.

name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleCount
description: Returns the number of roles selected in a role select menu interaction.

name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleID
description: Returns the selected role ID at the given 1-based index from a role select menu interaction.

name: ZgetRoleSelectRoleIDs
description: Returns all selected role IDs from a role select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

name: ZgetServerVar
description: Returns the value of a server-scoped variable, defaulting to the current server if not specified.

name: ZgetSlowmode
description: Returns the slowmode rate limit in seconds for the given channel, or 0 if no slowmode is set.

name: ZgetTextSplitIndex
description: Returns the 1-based index of the first element in the split that matches the given value, or -1 if not found.

name: ZgetTextSplitLength
description: Returns the number of elements in the current split text.

name: ZgetTimestamp
description: Returns the current Unix timestamp in the specified unit: seconds (s), milliseconds (ms), or nanoseconds (ns).

name: ZgetUserSelectUserCount
description: Returns the number of users selected in a user select menu interaction.

name: ZgetUserSelectUserID
description: Returns the selected user ID at the given 1-based index from a user select menu interaction.

name: ZgetUserSelectUserIDs
description: Returns all selected user IDs from a user select menu interaction joined by the given separator.

name: ZgetUserVar
description: Returns the value of a user-scoped variable, defaulting to the current user and server if not specified.

name: ZgetVar
description: Returns the value of a global bot-wide variable by name.

name: ZglobalCooldown
description: Applies a per-user global cooldown across all servers, preventing the user from running the command until the duration expires.

name: ZguildBanner
description: Returns the banner URL of the guild, or an empty string if no banner is set.

name: ZguildExists
description: Returns true if a guild with the given ID is accessible by the bot, or false otherwise.

name: ZguildID
description: Returns the ID of the current guild.

name: ZhasRole
description: Returns true if the specified user currently has the given role.

name: ZhighestRole
description: Returns the ID of the highest-position role held by the specified user, defaulting to the author.

name: ZhighestRoleWithPerms
description: Returns the ID of the highest-position role in the guild that has all of the specified permissions.

name: Zhour
description: Returns the current hour using the active timezone.

name: ZhttpAddHeader
description: Adds a custom HTTP header by name and value that will be sent with all subsequent HTTP requests in the current execution.

name: ZhttpDelete
description: Sends an HTTP DELETE request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

name: ZhttpGet
description: Sends an HTTP GET request to the specified URL and stores the response for access via ZhttpStatus and ZhttpResult.

name: ZhttpGetHeader
description: Returns the value of a custom HTTP header previously registered via ZhttpAddHeader, or an empty string if it does not exist.

name: ZhttpPatch
description: Sends an HTTP PATCH request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

name: ZhttpPost
description: Sends an HTTP POST request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

name: ZhttpPut
description: Sends an HTTP PUT request to the specified URL with an optional request body and stores the response.

name: ZhttpRemoveHeader
description: Removes a custom HTTP header previously set via ZhttpAddHeader so it is no longer sent with subsequent requests.

name: ZhttpResult
description: Returns the response body of the last HTTP request, optionally navigating into it as a JSON path where each argument is one level deeper.

name: ZhttpStatus
description: Returns the HTTP status code of the last HTTP request made in the current execution.

name: Zif
description: Evaluates a condition and returns the then-branch value if true, or the optional else-branch value if false.
example: Zif{ZgetUserVar{points}>=100;You have enough points!;Not enough points.}

name: ZignoreChannels
description: Halts execution if the current channel matches any of the provided channel IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: This command cannot be used in this channel.

name: Zimage
description: Sets the large image URL on the specified embed slot.

name: ZindexOf
description: Returns the 1-based character position of the first occurrence of a search string in the text, or 0 if not found.

name: ZinputValue
description: Returns the submitted value of a modal text input field by its field ID.

name: ZinviteInfo
description: Returns a specific field of a Discord invite by its code, where type is one of uses, channel, creationDate, inviter, or isTemporary.

name: ZisAdmin
description: Returns true if the command author or specified user has the Administrator permission in the current guild, otherwise false.

name: ZisBanned
description: Returns true if the specified user is currently banned from the guild.

name: ZisBoolean
description: Returns true if the value is exactly the string true or false, otherwise returns false.

name: ZisBooster
description: Returns true if the command author or specified user is currently boosting the current guild, otherwise false.

name: ZisBot
description: Returns true if the command author or specified user is a bot account, otherwise false.

name: ZisEmojiAnimated
description: Returns true if the custom emoji with the given ID is animated, or false if it is static.

name: ZisHoisted
description: Returns true if the given role is displayed separately in the member list, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: ZisInteger
description: Returns true if the value parses as a whole number with no decimal point, otherwise returns false.

name: ZisInVoice
description: Returns true if the specified user is currently connected to a voice channel, defaulting to the author.

name: ZisMentionable
description: Returns true if the given role can be mentioned by all users, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: ZisMentioned
description: Returns true if the specified user is mentioned in the triggering message, defaulting to the command author.

name: ZisMessageEdited
description: Returns true or false for whether a message has been edited, or returns its edit timestamp when type is timestamp.

name: ZisModerator
description: Returns true if the command author or specified user has the Moderate Members permission in the current guild, otherwise false.

name: ZisNSFW
description: Returns true if the given channel is marked as NSFW, or false otherwise.

name: ZisNumber
description: Returns true if the value parses as any numeric value including decimals, otherwise returns false.

name: ZisSlash
description: Returns true if the current command was triggered as a slash command, otherwise returns false.

name: ZisTimedOut
description: Returns true if the specified user currently has an active communication timeout.

name: ZisUserDMEnabled
description: Returns true if a DM channel can be successfully opened with the command author or specified user, otherwise false.

name: ZisValidHex
description: Returns true if the value is a valid six-digit hex color code, otherwise returns false.

name: ZjoinSplitText
description: Joins all elements in the current split text into a single string using the given separator.

name: ZjsonArray
description: Creates an empty JSON array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

name: ZjsonArrayAppend
description: Appends a value to the end of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

name: ZjsonArrayCount
description: Returns the number of elements in the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

name: ZjsonArrayIndex
description: Returns the 0-based index of the first occurrence of a value in the array at the specified key path, or -1 if not found.

name: ZjsonArrayPop
description: Removes and returns the last element of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

name: ZjsonArrayReverse
description: Reverses the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object in place.

name: ZjsonArrayShift
description: Removes and returns the first element of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

name: ZjsonArraySort
description: Sorts the array at the specified key path in ascending order, comparing numbers numerically and other values lexicographically.

name: ZjsonArrayUnshift
description: Inserts a value at the beginning of the array at the specified key path in the working JSON object.

name: ZjsonClear
description: Clears the working JSON object, discarding all stored data for the current execution.

name: ZjsonExists
description: Returns true if the specified key path exists in the working JSON object, or false otherwise.

name: ZjsonGet
description: Returns the value at the specified key path in the working JSON object, returning an empty string if the path does not exist.

name: ZjsonJoinArray
description: Joins all elements of the array at the specified key path into a single string using the provided separator.

name: ZjsonParse
description: Parses a JSON string and stores it as the working JSON object for the current execution.

name: ZjsonPretty
description: Serializes the working JSON object to a pretty-printed JSON string using the specified number of spaces for indentation.

name: ZjsonSet
description: Sets a value at the specified key path in the working JSON object, automatically inferring the value type.

name: ZjsonStringify
description: Serializes the working JSON object to a compact JSON string.

name: ZjsonUnset
description: Removes the key at the specified path from the working JSON object.

name: Zkick
description: Kicks a user from the guild with an optional reason.

name: ZlastMessageID
description: Returns the ID of the last message sent in the given channel, or an empty string if none exists.

name: ZlastPinTimestamp
description: Returns the date of the most recently pinned message in the channel formatted as YYYY-MM-DD, or an empty string if no pins exist.

name: ZlinesCount
description: Returns the number of lines in the text, returning zero for an empty string.

name: ZlistVar
description: Returns all global variable names joined by the given separator.

name: ZloopIndex
description: Returns the current 1-based iteration index of the active loop, or 0 if called outside a loop.

name: ZloopValue
description: Returns the current element value of the active loop, or an empty string if called outside a loop.

name: Zlowercase
description: Converts all characters in the text to lowercase.

name: ZlowestRole
description: Returns the ID of the lowest-position non-everyone role held by the specified user, defaulting to the author.

name: ZlowestRoleWithPerms
description: Returns the ID of the lowest-position role in the guild that has all of the specified permissions.

name: Zmax
description: Returns the largest value among all provided numbers.

name: ZmembersCount
description: Returns the total number of members in the guild, or the count filtered by presence status.

name: Zmentioned
description: Returns the user ID of the Nth mentioned user in the triggering message, optionally falling back to the author ID.

name: Zmessage
description: Returns the full message content after the command trigger, or the Nth space-separated word when an index is provided.

name: ZmessageID
description: Returns the ID of the message that triggered the current command execution.

name: ZmessageLink
description: Builds and returns a Discord jump URL for the specified message, using the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

name: Zmin
description: Returns the smallest value among all provided numbers.

name: Zminute
description: Returns the current minute using the active timezone.

name: ZmodifyChannel
description: Modifies one or more properties of an existing channel such as its name, topic, NSFW flag, position, and parent category.

name: ZmodifyRole
description: Modifies the name, color, hoist, and mentionable settings of an existing role, leaving any unspecified fields unchanged.

name: ZmodifyRolePerms
description: Adds or removes permissions from a role using prefixed operations where + grants, - denies, and / resets a permission.

name: Zmodulo
description: Returns the remainder of dividing the dividend by the divisor.

name: Zmonth
description: Returns the current month number using the active timezone.

name: Zmulti
description: Returns the product of all provided numbers.

name: Zmute
description: Server-mutes the specified user in all voice channels.

name: ZnewModal
description: Creates a modal dialog to collect text input from the user.

name: ZnewSelectMenu
description: Creates a string select menu on the bot's response.

name: Znot
description: Inverts a boolean value, returning false for true or 1, and true for anything else.

name: ZnumberSeparator
description: Formats a number string by inserting thousands separators, defaulting to a comma.

name: ZonlyAdmin
description: Halts execution unless the author has the Administrator permission in the guild.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You need Administrator permission to use this command.

name: ZonlyBotChannelPerms
description: Halts execution unless the bot has all of the specified permissions in the given channel.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: The bot does not have the required channel permissions.

name: ZonlyBotPerms
description: Halts execution unless the bot has all of the specified guild permissions.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: The bot does not have the required permissions.

name: ZonlyForCategories
description: Halts execution unless the current channel belongs to one of the specified category IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: This command can only be used in specific categories.

name: ZonlyForChannels
description: Halts execution unless the current channel matches one of the specified channel IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: This command can only be used in specific channels.

name: ZonlyForIDs
description: Halts execution unless the author's user ID matches one of the specified IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You are not allowed to use this command.

name: ZonlyForRoleIDs
description: Halts execution unless the author has at least one of the specified role IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You do not have the required role to use this command.

name: ZonlyForRoles
description: Halts execution unless the author has at least one of the specified roles matched by name.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You do not have the required role to use this command.

name: ZonlyForServers
description: Halts execution unless the current guild ID matches one of the specified server IDs.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: This command is not available in this server.

name: ZonlyForUsers
description: Halts execution unless the author's username matches one of the specified usernames.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You are not allowed to use this command.

name: ZonlyIf
description: Halts execution with a custom error message if the given condition evaluates to false.
example: ZonlyIf{ZisSlash{}==true;This command only works as a slash command.}

name: ZonlyIfMessageContains
description: Halts execution with an error message unless the provided message text contains all of the specified words.

name: ZonlyNSFW
description: Halts execution unless the current channel is marked as NSFW.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: This command can only be used in NSFW channels.

example: ZonlyNSFW{This command requires an NSFW channel.}

name: ZonlyPerms
description: Halts execution unless the author has all of the specified guild permissions.

arguments.name: errorMessage
arguments.default: You do not have permission to use this command.

name: Zoption
description: Returns the value of a named slash command option by its key.

name: ZpadLeft
description: Pads the text on the left with a repeated character until it reaches the specified width, defaulting to a space.

name: ZpadRight
description: Pads the text on the right with a repeated character until it reaches the specified width, defaulting to a space.

name: ZparentID
description: Returns the ID of the parent category of the given channel, or an empty string if the channel has no parent.

name: Zping
description: Returns the bot's gateway latency in milliseconds.

name: ZpinMessage
description: Pins the specified message in a channel, defaulting to the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

name: ZpostTags
description: Returns a space-separated list of tag IDs currently applied to a forum post thread.

name: Zpow
description: Returns the base raised to the power of the exponent.

name: ZpublishMessage
description: Crossposts a message from an announcement channel to all subscribed channels.

name: Zrandom
description: Returns a random integer between min and max (inclusive).

name: ZrandomCategoryID
description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected category channel in the current server.

name: ZrandomChannelID
description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected text channel in the current server.

name: ZrandomGuildID
description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected guild that the bot is a member of.

name: ZrandomMention
description: Returns a formatted mention string for a randomly selected member in the current server.

name: ZrandomRoleID
description: Returns the ID of a randomly selected role in the current server.

name: ZrandomString
description: Returns a random alphanumeric string of the specified length.

name: ZrandomText
description: Returns one of the provided text values chosen at random.

name: ZrandomUser
description: Returns the display name of a randomly selected member in the current server.

name: ZrandomUserID
description: Returns the user ID of a randomly selected member in the current server.

name: ZregexMatch
description: Returns true if the text matches the given regular expression pattern.

name: ZregexReplace
description: Replaces all substrings in the text that match the regular expression pattern with the specified replacement.

name: ZremoveAllComponents
description: Removes all components from a message, defaulting to the triggering message.

name: ZremoveButtons
description: Removes all buttons from a message by clearing all its components, defaulting to the triggering message.

name: ZremoveComponent
description: Removes a specific component by its custom ID from a message, defaulting to the triggering message.

name: ZremoveEmoji
description: Deletes a custom emoji from the current server by its ID.

name: ZremoveLinks
description: Removes all whitespace-delimited tokens beginning with http:// or https:// from the text.

name: ZremoveSplitTextElement
description: Removes the element at the given 1-based index from the current split text.

name: Zrepeat
description: Executes the given code block N times and returns each non-empty output joined by newlines.

name: ZreplaceText
description: Replaces occurrences of a sample substring in text with a new string, with an optional limit on the number of replacements.

name: ZrepliedMessageID
description: Returns the ID of the message that the specified or triggering message is replying to.

name: Zreply
description: Signals that the bot's response should be sent as a reply to the triggering message.

name: ZreplyIn
description: Schedules a reply to the triggering message after the specified duration has elapsed.

name: ZresetChannelVar
description: Deletes the given channel variable across every channel.

name: ZresetServerVar
description: Deletes the given server variable across every server.

name: ZresetUserVar
description: Deletes the given user variable for every user in the current server.

name: ZroleColor
description: Returns the hex color code of a role, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: ZroleCount
description: Returns the total number of roles in the current guild.

name: ZroleExists
description: Returns true if the given role ID exists in the guild, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: ZroleGrant
description: Grants or removes one or more roles from a user using prefixed operations where + adds and - removes a role.

name: ZroleID
description: Returns the command author's top role ID, or searches for and returns the ID of a guild role matching the given name.

name: ZroleMemberCount
description: Returns the number of members who have the given role, defaulting to the author's highest role.

name: ZroleMembers
description: Returns a space-separated list of user IDs for all members who have the given role, defaulting to the author's highest role.

name: ZroleName
description: Returns the name of a role by its ID, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: ZroleNames
description: Returns all role names in the guild sorted by position from highest to lowest, joined by the given separator.

name: ZrolePerms
description: Returns the permission names granted to a role joined by the given separator, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: ZrolePosition
description: Returns the hierarchy position of a role, defaulting to the author's top role if no ID is provided.

name: Zround
description: Rounds a number to the specified number of decimal places, defaulting to zero decimal places.

name: ZrulesChannelID
description: Returns the ID of the rules channel in the guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

name: Zsecond
description: Returns the current second using the active timezone.

name: ZsendEmbed
description: Sends the embed at the specified slot index to a Discord channel, optionally returning the sent message ID.

name: ZsendMessage
description: Sends a message to the specified channel (or the current channel if omitted), and optionally returns the sent message's ID.

name: ZsendWebhook
description: Sends the embed at the specified slot index via a Discord webhook URL, optionally returning the message ID.

name: ZserverChannels
description: Returns a separator-joined list of channel IDs for the specified server.

name: ZserverCooldown
description: Applies a server-wide cooldown that prevents anyone in the server from running the command until the duration expires.

name: ZserverCount
description: Returns the number of guilds the bot is currently in.

name: ZserverDescription
description: Returns the description of the guild, or an empty string if none is set.

name: ZserverEmojis
description: Returns the custom emojis of the guild as formatted emoji strings joined by the specified separator.

name: ZserverEvents
description: Returns a space-separated list of all scheduled event IDs in the current server.

name: ZserverIcon
description: Returns the icon URL of the guild, or an empty string if no icon is set.

name: ZserverInvite
description: Returns the URL of the first available invite for the guild, or an empty string if none exist.

name: ZserverName
description: Returns the name of the guild.

name: ZserverNames
description: Returns a list of the names of all guilds the bot is in, optionally limited to a count and joined by the separator.

name: ZserverOwner
description: Returns the user ID of the guild owner.

name: ZserverRoles
description: Returns a separator-joined list of role IDs for the specified server.

name: ZserverStickers
description: Returns a space-separated list of all sticker IDs in the current server.

name: ZserverVerificationLevel
description: Returns the verification level of the current guild as a string such as none, low, medium, high, or very_high.

name: ZsetChannelVar
description: Sets the value of a channel-scoped variable, defaulting to the current channel if not specified.

name: ZsetPostTags
description: Replaces all applied tags on a forum post thread with the specified tag IDs.

name: ZsetServerVar
description: Sets the value of a server-scoped variable, defaulting to the current server if not specified.

name: ZsetUserRoles
description: Replaces all roles of the specified user with exactly the provided list of role IDs.

name: ZsetUserVar
description: Sets the value of a user-scoped variable, defaulting to the current user and server if not specified.

name: ZsetVar
description: Sets the value of a global bot-wide variable by name.

name: ZslashCommandsCount
description: Returns the number of slash-type commands loaded from the commands directory.

name: ZslashID
description: Returns the Discord application command ID for the specified slash command name, or for the currently executing slash command if no name is provided.

name: ZslowMode
description: Sets the slowmode rate limit on a channel to the specified duration (0 or 0s disables it).

name: Zsort
description: Sorts a variadic list of numbers in ascending or descending order and returns up to a specified count joined by a separator.

name: ZsplitText
description: Returns a single element from the stored split text by 1-based index, or use < for the first or > for the last element.

name: Zsqrt
description: Returns the square root of the given non-negative number.

name: ZstageCreate
description: Creates a new stage instance in the specified stage channel with the given topic.

name: ZstageDelete
description: Ends and deletes the stage instance associated with the specified stage channel.

name: ZstageEdit
description: Edits the topic of an existing stage instance in the specified stage channel.

name: ZstageTopic
description: Returns the current topic of the stage instance in the specified stage channel.

name: ZstartsWith
description: Returns true if the text begins with the specified prefix.

name: ZstartThread
description: Creates a new thread in the specified channel, optionally attaching it to an existing message, and returns the thread ID if requested.

name: ZstickerCount
description: Returns the total number of stickers in the current server.

name: ZstickerDescription
description: Returns the description of a guild sticker by its sticker ID, or an empty string if no description is set.

name: ZstickerEmoji
description: Returns the related emoji tag for a guild sticker as a string.

name: ZstickerExists
description: Returns true if a sticker with the given ID exists in the current server, or false otherwise.

name: ZstickerID
description: Returns the ID of a guild sticker matching the given name, or an empty string if not found.

name: ZstickerName
description: Returns the name of a guild sticker by its sticker ID.

name: Zstop
description: Halts execution silently without producing any output or error message.

name: Zsub
description: Subtracts each subsequent number from the first value and returns the result.

name: Zsubstring
description: Returns a portion of the text starting at a 1-based character position, optionally limited to a specified length.

name: Zsum
description: Returns the sum of all provided numbers.

name: ZsuppressErrors
description: Activates error suppression for the current execution, optionally showing a custom message or a specific embed slot instead of the real error.

name: ZsystemChannelID
description: Returns the ID of the system messages channel in the current guild, or an empty string if none is configured.

name: ZtextSplit
description: Splits a string by a separator and stores the resulting elements for use with other split functions.

name: ZthreadAddMember
description: Adds a user to the specified thread by their user ID.

name: ZthreadArchived
description: Returns true if the thread is archived.

name: ZthreadLocked
description: Returns true if the thread is locked.

name: ZthreadMessageCount
description: Returns the number of messages in the specified thread.

name: ZthreadParentID
description: Returns the parent channel ID of the thread, or empty string.

name: ZthreadRemoveMember
description: Removes a user from the specified thread by their user ID.

name: ZthreadUserCount
description: Returns the total number of members currently in the specified thread.

name: Zthumbnail
description: Sets the thumbnail image URL on the specified embed slot.

name: Ztime
description: Sets the active timezone for all subsequent date/time functions, or returns the current timezone name when called with no argument.

name: ZtimeDiff
description: Returns the absolute difference between two Unix timestamps in the specified unit such as seconds, minutes, hours, or days.

name: Ztimeout
description: Applies a communication timeout to a user for the specified duration, up to a maximum of 28 days.

name: Ztimestamp
description: Enables the current UTC timestamp display on the specified embed slot.

name: Ztitle
description: Sets the title text on the specified embed slot.

name: Ztitlecase
description: Converts the first letter of each word to uppercase and all remaining letters to lowercase.

name: ZtitleURL
description: Sets a hyperlink URL on the embed's title, requiring a title to already be set on that slot.

name: ZtrimContent
description: Collapses multiple consecutive spaces into a single space and trims leading and trailing whitespace.

name: ZtrimSpace
description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace from the text.

name: ZtryRun
description: Evaluates the code block and falls back to the fallback block if any error occurs.

name: Zunban
description: Removes the ban for the specified user from the guild.

name: Zundeafen
description: Removes the server deafen from the specified user so they can hear audio in voice channels again.

name: Zunmute
description: Removes the server mute from the specified user in all voice channels.

name: ZunpinMessage
description: Unpins the specified message in a channel, defaulting to the current channel if no channel ID is provided.

name: ZuntimeOut
description: Removes the active communication timeout from a user, restoring their ability to send messages.

name: Zuppercase
description: Converts all characters in the text to uppercase.

name: Zuptime
description: Returns the bot's uptime since startup, formatted as a human-readable string of days, hours, minutes, and seconds.

name: Zurl
description: Encodes or decodes a string using URL percent-encoding based on the specified mode.

name: ZuseChannel
description: Redirects all bot output for the current command execution to the specified channel.

name: ZuserAvatar
description: Returns the avatar URL of the command author, or of the specified user if a user ID is provided.

name: ZuserBadge
description: Returns the public profile badges of the command author or specified user as a separated list.

name: ZuserBanner
description: Returns the banner URL of the command author or specified user, or an empty string if no banner is set.

name: ZuserBannerColor
description: Returns the banner accent color of the command author or specified user as a hex string, or an empty string if none is set.

name: ZuserExists
description: Returns true if the given user ID resolves to a valid Discord user, or false otherwise.

name: ZuserID
description: Returns the command author's user ID, or searches for and returns the user ID of a guild member matching the given name.

name: ZuserJoined
description: Returns the date when the command author or specified user joined the current guild, formatted according to the optional format string.

name: Zusername
description: Returns the username of the command author, or of the specified user if a user ID is provided.

name: ZuserPerms
description: Returns the guild permissions held by the command author or specified user, up to the given amount, joined by the separator.

name: ZuserReacted
description: Returns true if the specified user reacted to a message with the given emoji, or false otherwise.

name: ZuserRoles
description: Returns a list of the specified user's roles joined by the given separator, with output format controlled by returnType.

name: ZuserSelfDeafened
description: Returns true if the specified user has deafened themselves in voice, defaulting to the author.

name: ZuserSelfMuted
description: Returns true if the specified user has muted themselves in voice, defaulting to the author.

name: ZuserServerAvatar
description: Returns the guild-specific avatar URL of the command author or specified user, falling back to their global avatar or default avatar if none is set.

name: ZuserServerDeafened
description: Returns true if the specified user has been server-deafened by a moderator, defaulting to the author.

name: ZuserServerMuted
description: Returns true if the specified user has been server-muted by a moderator, defaulting to the author.

name: ZuserStatus
description: Returns the online status of the command author or specified user, or their custom status text if customStatus is true.

name: ZuserStreaming
description: Returns true if the specified user is currently streaming in a voice channel, defaulting to the author.

name: ZuserVoiceChannel
description: Returns the ID of the voice channel the specified user is in, or an empty string if they are not in voice.

name: Zvar
description: Gets or sets a temporary in-memory variable that persists only for the duration of the current command execution.

name: ZvarExistError
description: Halts execution with a custom error message if the specified global variable does not exist.

name: ZvarExists
description: Returns true if a global variable with the given name exists, otherwise returns false.

name: ZvoiceBitrate
description: Returns the bitrate in kbps of the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

name: ZvoiceEmpty
description: Returns true if the specified voice channel has zero members; defaults to the author's current voice channel.

name: ZvoiceFull
description: Returns true if the specified voice channel's member count equals its user limit; defaults to the author's current voice channel.

name: ZvoiceKick
description: Disconnects the specified user from their current voice channel.

name: ZvoiceNew
description: Returns the new voice channel ID from the onVoiceStateUpdate event context (the channel the user moved to).

name: ZvoiceMemberCount
description: Returns the number of users currently in the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

name: ZvoiceOld
description: Returns the previous voice channel ID from the onVoiceStateUpdate event context (the channel the user was in before).

name: ZvoiceMembers
description: Returns a space-separated list of user IDs currently in the specified voice channel, defaulting to the author's current voice channel.

name: ZvoiceMove
description: Moves a user from their current voice channel to the specified target voice channel.

name: ZvoiceUserLimit
description: Returns the maximum number of users allowed in a voice or stage channel, or 0 if there is no limit.

name: ZwebhookCreate
description: Creates a webhook in the specified channel and returns its full URL.

name: ZwebhookDelete
description: Deletes a webhook identified by its full Discord webhook URL.

name: Zyear
description: Returns the current four-digit year using the active timezone.
